title: Runner ctx.cwd value: project root vs substrate root
context: Runner ctx.cwd value: the project root vs the substrate root — fix per where the run blocks/paths resolve.
decision: ctx.cwd is the wasc project root. The workflow .workflows discovery and run-dirs/artifacts belong in the project, not a substrate dir; the workflow uses no native block steps; command steps handle their own Django cd, uv, and DATABASE_URL.
consequences: Determines path/block resolution semantics for every workflow step.
